since_last: 28% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.03%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 28% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.44% · BTC -0.72% · Gold -1.28% · Nasdaq100 -1.38%. 28% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.03%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.03%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.09%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -10.65%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +7.15%, INTU +6.27%, ADBE +4.56%, CRM +4.17%, WDAY +4.16%. Laggards: SKHY -10.65%, OKLO -9.52%, CRNC -8.80%, SMR -8.79%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.60% at $131.76
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
